column_description: the unique identifier of the record

the id of the game
Maps to games(id)

the id of the person
Maps to person(id)
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
The times a person participated in the Olympics games could be calculated by grouping by person_id.

column_description: the age of the person when he/she participated in the game
value_description:
commonsense evidence:
If person A's age was 22 when he participated in game A and his age was 24 when he participated in game B, it means that game A was held two years earlier than game B.
